display_text: Skywrath Mage Aghanim's Scepter: Creates an additional Mystic Flare on a random nearby enemy within 500 range of the original target. This upgrade counters AoE healing or damage mitigation by applying double burst damage in a clustered fight, forcing enemies to spread out or suffer massive magical damage.
search_text: Skywrath Mage Aghanim Scepter AOE burst damage counter-mitigation spread-out strategic damage upgrade

display_text: Skywrath Mage Aghanim's Shard: Fires two additional Arcane Bolts at random enemies near the original target, prioritizing heroes. This upgrade counters hero-focused sustain or evasion mechanics by ensuring consistent magical damage output even against elusive or healing-heavy targets.
search_text: Skywrath Mage Aghanim Shard counter-heal counter-evasion hero-focused magical damage upgrade
